nasb.text: ‘I tell you that to everyone who has, more shall be given, but from the one who does not have, even what he does have shall be taken away.

esv.text: ‘I tell you that to everyone who has, more will be given, but from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away.

cnv.text: 主人說：‘我告訴你們，凡是有的，還要給他；沒有的，就算他有甚麼也要拿去。

ccb.text: “主人答道，‘我告诉你们，凡有的，还要给他更多；凡没有的，连他仅有的也要夺走。

csbs.text: “我告诉你们：凡是有的，还要赐给他；那没有的，连他有的也将从他那里被拿走。
